chunks.text: Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2021 - EECS at Berkeley Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2021 New Directions → New Faculty To showcase our vision of the long-term future of the department, this year’s research symposium will feature the department’s newest ladder-rank faculty members, covering topics that run the gamut of the EECS spectrum. There will also be shorter talks by graduate students on a broader range of topics, representing the whole ecosystem of graduate work housed in the world-renowned centers and labs under the EECS umbrella. BEARS 2021 will take place virtually on February 11th. Questions?
